All other titles appear once.

Computed: 25 initial - 3 merged duplicates = 22 unique. 22 - 4 trashed (pre-2000) = 18 remaining. 18 - 4 flagged incomplete = 14 included. Confirmed by verifier perfect-score test (34_verifier_perfect_score.json) which shows included_studies=14 and bib_export=14.

Path matches task description and verifier logic. Live testing confirmed /home/ga/Desktop exists with write permissions (evidence: 28_desktop_permissions.txt). BibTeX export via Zotero confirmed functional (evidence: screenshot of File menu showing export options).

privileged_info_summary: The Zotero library contains exactly 25 journal articles. Three papers appear as exact duplicates (2 copies each): 'Neuroscience-Inspired Artificial Intelligence' (Hassabis et al. 2017 — one copy has DOI 10.1016/j.neuron.2017.06.011, the other has pages 245-258), 'A deep learning framework for neuroscience' (Richards et al. 2019 — one copy has venue 'Nature Neuroscience' with DOI 10.1038/s41593-019-0520-2 and pages 1761-1770, the other has abbreviated venue 'Nat. Neurosci.' with no DOI), and 'Toward an Integration of Deep Learning and Neuroscience' (Marblestone et al. 2016 — one copy has venue 'Frontiers in Computational Neuroscience' with DOI 10.3389/fncom.2016.00094, the other has abbreviated venue 'Front. Comput. Neurosci.'). After merging, 22 unique papers remain. Exactly 4 papers are pre-2000: Hodgkin & Huxley 1952, Hubel & Wiesel 1962, Hopfield 1982, Rumelhart et al. 1986. Exactly 4 papers have the placeholder abstract 'Abstract not available': Yamins et al. 2014, Banino et al. 2018, Kell et al. 2018, Saxe et al. 2021. Two standalone papers have abbreviated venue names: Barak 2017 has 'Curr. Opin. Neurobiol.' (should be 'Current Opinion in Neurobiology') and Kriegeskorte 2015 has 'Annu. Rev. Vis. Sci.' (should be 'Annual Review of Vision Science'). The correct venue names can be verified by comparing with other papers in the library that use the full forms (Barrett et al. 2019 and Lindsay 2021, respectively). After all operations (merge 3 duplicate pairs, trash 4 pre-2000, flag 4 incomplete), exactly 14 papers should be in the 'Included Studies' collection. The BibTeX export should be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/included_studies.bib with 14 entries. A standalone note titled 'Screening Summary' should exist in the 'Included Studies' collection. The 4 incomplete papers should be tagged 'incomplete-record' and placed in a collection called 'Needs Manual Review'.
